title: SSDF
summary:
[]: SSDF?             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Mar 25, 2005 9:45 am On episode 6 Misato says she's going to borrow the "SSDF" prototype for the positron rifle. On the scripts it says, instead of SSDF, the following: 戦自研 Which I couldn't translate. Is this the "Ship Self Defence Force"? Or is it more like SDF or Self Defence Force alone?

[]:

chunks.content:
Article: SSDF
[]: SSDF?             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Mar 25, 2005 9:45 am On episode 6 Misato says she's going to borrow the "SSDF" prototype for the positron rifle. On the scripts it says, instead of SSDF, the following: 戦自研 Which I couldn't translate. Is this the "Ship Self Defence Force"? Or is it more like SDF or Self Defence Force alone?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 25, 2005 10:20 am The first two kanji, anyway, are just an abbreviation for the Strategic Self-Defense Force.

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Tue May 17, 2005 6:04 am Hmmm, this word 戦自研 propably stands for "Self-Denfence Research Dpt."
